name: Openthread → Set Poll Period
description: Sets the poll period at runtime on an MTD device. When `poll_period` > 0 the radio is off while idle (sleepy end device); when 0 the radio is always on. This action is a no-op on FTD devices.

config_entries.label: Poll Period
config_entries.description: The poll period to apply, e.g. the short form `openthread.set_poll_period: 5s`.
